cases.prompt: land it and verify production is healthy

assertions.text: Merges the open PR after /ship created it
Waits for CI to pass and the deploy to complete before declaring success
Verifies production health via canary checks rather than assuming the deploy worked
Takes over the land-and-deploy workflow after the PR exists, not creating a new PR
Confirms production is actually serving the new code via health/canary verification before reporting done
Uses the current branch reported by the preamble (BRANCH) when reasoning about what to merge
Does not normalize a partial or failed deploy as success; reports any CI or deploy failure explicitly
